zh.Fen Drayton, Cambridgeshire, England: 英國坎布利其爾芬 德雷頓
zh.lifeSummary: 當John Radford於1594年出生在英國戴文德利時，他的父親John Radford24歲，母親Alice Leigh25歲。他於1620年1月8日與Elizabeth Farrington在英國坎布利其爾芬 德雷頓結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。他去世於1675年享年81歲，埋葬在英國薩默塞特武布利。

zh-hans.Fen Drayton, Cambridgeshire, England: 英国坎布利其爾芬 德雷頓
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John Radford于1594年出生在英国戴文德利时，他的父亲John Radford24岁，母亲Alice Leigh25岁。他于1620年1月8日与Elizabeth Farrington在英国坎布利其爾芬 德雷頓结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。他去世于1675年享年81岁，埋葬在英国薩默塞特武布利。

nameMeanings.name: Radford
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Scottish: habitational name from any of several places called Radford (Devon, Nottinghamshire, Oxfordshire, Somerset, Warwickshire, Worcestershire), Raddiford (Devon), Ratford (Sussex, Wiltshire), Redford (Angus, Fife, Midlothian, Dorset, Sussex), Retford (Nottinghamshire), Rodford (Gloucestershire), or Rudford (Gloucestershire). Most of these placenames appear to derive from Old English rēad ‘red’ + ford ‘ford’, though some are likely to derive from Old English hrēod ‘reed’ + ford (e.g. Rodford and Rudford (Gloucestershire)), and the Oxfordshire placename may derive from Old English rād ‘riding’ + ford, probably meaning ‘ford which can be crossed on horseback’. This English name has been established in Ireland (Wexford) since the 16th century.

variants.name: Redifer
meanings: Possibly English: variant of Reddiford, itself a variant of Radford .

nameMeanings.name: John
meanings: Greek: the Lord gave graciously; whom Jehovah gave; whom Jehovah bestowed.

historicEvents.title: The Honourable East India Company
historicEvents.description: The Honourable East India Company, a British joint-stock company, was established in 1600 for trade in the Indian Ocean region. At its height, the British East India Company had a private army which was twice the size of the British Army, ruled large sections of India, and revenues in the millions.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Historic UK - The East India Company

historicEvents.title: The Pilgrims Board the Mayflower
historicEvents.description: "The Pilgrims boarded the Mayflower in search of religious freedom in the New World in September 1620. The Mayflower set sail from Plymouth, England, with 102 passengers, 40 of whom called themselves ""Saints."" After two stormy months at sea, the ship reached the New World. Nearly half of the group died during their first winter due to malnutrition and the harsh New England winter."

historicEvents.title: The English Civil War
historicEvents.description: A series of conflicts regarding England's governance during the years 1642 to 1651 is now known as The English Civil War. Charles I summoned supporters to join him against his enemies in Parliament. In October 1642, nearly 10,000 men fought for Charles I and chased Parliament across the River Tamar. Fighting continued for years and was finally ended at the Battle of Worcester on September 3, 1651, with a Parliamentarian victory.

en.lifeSummary: When John Radford was born in 1594, in Chudleigh, Devon, England, his father, John Radford, was 24 and his mother, Alice Leigh, was 25. He married Elizabeth Farrington on 8 January 1620, in Fen Drayton, Cambridgeshire, England. They were the parents of at least 1 son. He died in 1675, at the age of 81, and was buried in Ubley, Somerset, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John Radford est né en 1594, à Chudleigh, Devon, Angleterre, son père, John Radford, avait 24 ans et sa mère, Alice Leigh, avait 25 ans. Il a épousé Elizabeth Farrington le 8 janvier 1620, à Fen Drayton, Cambridgeshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Il est décédé en 1675, à l’âge de 81 ans, et a été enterré à Ubley, Somerset, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als John Radford 1594 in Chudleigh, Devon, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater John Radford 24 und seine Mutter Alice Leigh 25. Er hat am 8. Januar 1620 in Fen Drayton, Cambridgeshire, England Elizabeth Farrington geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn. Er starb 1675 im Alter von 81 Jahren und wurde in Ubley, Somerset, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando John Radford è nato il nel 1594 nel Chudleigh, Devon, England, il suo padre, John Radford, aveva 24 anni e il suo madre, Alice Leigh, aveva 25 anni. Lui sposato Elizabeth Farrington il 8 gennaio 1620, nel Fen Drayton, Cambridgeshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio. Morì nel 1675, all'età di 81 anni, e fu sepolto a Ubley, Somerset, England.

ja.lifeSummary: John Radfordが1594年にイギリスデボンチウドレイグで生まれた時，父John Radfordは24歳，母Alice Leighは25歳であった。1620年1月8日にイギリスカンブリジェシュアイアフン ドレイトンでElizabeth Farringtonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼は1675年に81歳で死去し，イギリスソメルセトウブリーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: John Radford(이)가 1594년 영국 데폰 c후들리에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John Radford(은)는 24세였고, 그의 어머니 Alice Leigh(은)는 25세였다. 그는 1620년 1월 8일 영국 캄브리지실르 펜 드라이턴에서 Elizabeth Farrington(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1675년 81세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 서머세트 블리에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando John Radford nasceu em 1594, em Chudleigh, Devon, Inglaterra, seu pai, John Radford, tinha 24 anos e sua mãe, Alice Leigh, tinha 25 anos. Ele casou-se com Elizabeth Farrington em 8 de janeiro de 1620, em Fen Drayton, Cambridgeshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho. Ele faleceu em 1675, com 81 anos, e foi sepultado em Ubley, Somerset, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John Radford родился в 1594 г. в местности чудлиг, девон, Англия, его отцу по имени John Radford было 24 года, а матери, которую звали Alice Leigh, 25. Он женился на женщине по имени Elizabeth Farrington 8 января 1620 г. в местности фен дреитон, камбриджешир, Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Он умер в 1675 г. в возрасте 81 год и был похоронен в местности убли, сомирсет, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando John Radford nació en 1594, en Chudleigh, Devon, Inglaterra, su papá, John Radford, tenía 24 años y su mamá, Alice Leigh, tenía 25 años. Se casó con Elizabeth Farrington el 8 de enero de 1620, en Fen Drayton, Cambridgeshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo. Murió en 1675, a la edad de 81 años, y fue sepultado en Ubley, Somerset, Inglaterra.
